memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description: Margaret Emme Iwardby of Quainton was born on October 18, 1477, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England. She married Ralph (Sir) Verney of Pendley 11 in 1493 in her hometown. They had ten children in 29 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Emme Iwardby於1477年10月18日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾華頓時，她的父親Sir John Iwardby28歲，母親Joan Frances Brudenell35歲。她於1505年與Sir Ralph Verney在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾華頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年6月26日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾華頓享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Emme Iwardby于1477年10月18日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾華頓时，她的父亲Sir John Iwardby28岁，母亲Joan Frances Brudenell35岁。她于1505年与Sir Ralph Verney在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾華頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1519年6月26日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾華頓享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Emme Iwardby was born on 18 October 1477, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John Iwardby, was 28 and her mother, Joan Frances Brudenell, was 35. She married Sir Ralph Verney in 1505, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 June 1519, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Emme Iwardby est née le 18 octobre 1477, à Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Iwardby, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Frances Brudenell, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Verney en 1505, à Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1519, à Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1505 in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph Verney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juni 1519 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Emme Iwardbyが1477年10月18日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクアイントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Iwardbyは28歳，母Joan Frances Brudenellは35歳であった。1505年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクアイントンでSir Ralph Verneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1519年6月26日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクアイントンで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリー ベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Emme Iwardby(이)가 1477년 10월 18일 영국 벅잉함실르 퀄인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Iwardby(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Frances Brudenell(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 퀄인턴에서 Sir Ralph Verney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 6월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 퀄인턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 발에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Emme Iwardby родилась 18 октября 1477 г. в местности куеинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Iwardby было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Frances Brudenell, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Verney в 1505 г. в местности куеинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 июня 1519 г. в местности куеинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности аилесбури веил, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
